message:
feat(goal): implement goal-oriented optimization with greedy+ILP, preference learning, and CLI integration

Substantially extends the goal-oriented optimization subsystem (Plan
Section 5.14) with structured logging, preference learning, and full
CLI integration.

goal_optimizer.rs (730+ insertions):
- Add OptimizationLogEvent struct for structured optimization telemetry
  with algorithm, candidate_id, loss, score, and contribution fields
- Add ReoptimizationDecision struct for tracking candidate set changes
  and whether re-optimization was needed
- Add PreferenceModel with risk_tolerance and learning_rate for
  Bayesian-style preference learning from user plan choices
- Add PreferenceUpdate tracking prior/observed/updated values
- Extend OptimizationResult with log_events vec for audit trail
- Wire structured logging throughout greedy and ILP optimization
  algorithms, emitting events for candidate scoring, selection,
  pruning, and goal achievement checks

main.rs (375+ insertions):
- Add --goal flag to scan command for advisory goal output
- Remove "coming in v1.2" placeholder from agent-plan --goal flag
- Wire goal_optimizer and goal_parser imports for parse_goal,
  optimize_greedy, optimize_ilp, OptCandidate, ResourceGoal
- Add build_goal_advisory_from_scan() to produce structured goal
  advisory output from scan results
- Integrate goal advisory into JSON and text output formats
- Import QuickScanResult for scan result access

goal_optimization_tests.rs (658 lines, new):
- Comprehensive test suite covering greedy and ILP optimization
  algorithms, preference model updates, reoptimization decisions,
  structured log event emission, and edge cases (empty candidates,
  infeasible goals, single-candidate selection)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
